title: Search: full-text article search tab
description: Shared execution root for the search tab feature. Encompasses the APIClient extension (searchArticles), a new SearchView with full state handling and debounced pagination, AppRoot tab wiring, and unit tests for query construction. No project.yml edit required — SearchView.swift falls under the existing AggregatorApp source glob, but xcodegen must be re-run after the file is created.
acceptance_criteria: xcodebuild test exits 0 including new searchArticles query-construction tests
A detached Search tab appears at the trailing edge of the tab bar (role: .search); existing tabs are unchanged
Typing performs live debounced search (~300 ms); submit runs immediately
Empty/whitespace query never hits the network and shows the Idle ContentUnavailableView
Results render with ArticleRowView; tapping opens ArticlePagerView with full read/save behaviour
Pagination uses the committed query + nextCursor; paging never mixes queries
Empty-results, Loading, Error (with Retry), and Not-Configured states all render
No sort or unread control is shown; results are in backend relevance order
No hardcoded hex colors; GlassEffectContainer wraps the list; SF Symbols only
